desc: Opens a modeless WPF DataGrid to inspect and bulk-edit elevation/hosting parameters of selected FamilyInstance elements.
summary: Opens a modeless WPF DataGrid to inspect and bulk-edit elevation/hosting parameters of selected FamilyInstance elements. Reads parameters once into a snapshot, shows the grid, and writes only dirty values back via ParameterEditorViewModel. Uses CommandExecutor.SetResultObject to signal AI Chat. Uses CommandFeedback for all user notifications.
usecase: User wants to inspect/edit elevation parameters of multiple families at once. AI Chat triggers parameter editing as part of a placement verification workflow.
notfor: Editing parameters of non-FamilyInstance elements (walls, floors, etc.). Bulk parameter export to Excel (use ExportParametersCommand).
precondition: Active Revit document must be open. FamilyInstances may or may not be pre-selected — the editor supports launching with an empty grid and refreshing later.
postcondition: A singleton ParameterEditorView window is shown. Changed parameter values are written back inside a Transaction when the user clicks Apply.

preprompts: Loading family parameters into the editor...
successprompts: Editor is ready — edit values and click Apply to save.
